ORDER CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONERS THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, IN THEIR CAPCITIES AS TRUSTEES OF THE CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR CALIFORNIA; CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY TRUST FUN FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA; CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND FOR NORTHER CALIFORNIA; CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA; AND NORTHER CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077
